Statute.Title: Canada Development Investment Corporation Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Corporation de développement des investissements du Canada, Loi sur la)

CIF.Text: CIF, 2026, c. 3, s. 386, enacting ss. 1 to 28 of the Canada Development Investment Corporation Act, comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 388 — Not in force
